titleStmt.title: SII 31.118: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 118. (A.R. No. B 276 of 1938.) SAMBAṬŪRU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Chennakēśvasvāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1479, Pingaḷa, Āsvija śu. 2, Corresponding to September 24th, Friday, 1557 A.D.

It records the sale deed of a land situated near Komāḷḷa kālva (canal) and Battula kālva, of sowing capacity of 13 puṭṭis, one kuncha and two kumṭas for 50 varahas at Cheḍipirāla for maintaining the offerings in different months to the god Kēśavaperumal at Sambaṭūru alias Śrī Bhāshyapuram, by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandēḷa China Ahōbalēśvaradēva mahārāju. The distribution of the gift is as follows 22 varāhas of land for maintaining the offerings in the month of Āśvija, 10 varāhas for the offerings (āragimpu) in the month of Chaitra, 10 varāhas for the offerings in the month of Vaiśākha and 3 varāhas for performing the tiruhāram in the maṇḍapa of the temple of Kēśava perumal. It is stated that the gift of one-fourth of the prasāda due to the donee from the temple, should be enjoyed by Bhōjanapalle Kṛishṅamāchāryyalu for a long time. Chaḍipirāla is stated to belong to Mulkināḍusīma, in Ghaṇḍikota-sima, of the Udayagiri-chāvaḍi, the Mulkināḍu-sīma has been granted as nāyaṁkara by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1479 Agunēṭi piṁgaḷa saṁvatsara Āśvīja śuddha 2 śukravārāna śrīmatērāmānujāyanamaḥ . śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpasadāśivadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍaipṛdhivīsāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmanmaṁhā
maṁḍalēśvara naṁdēla Ahōbalēśvaradēvamahārājala komāruṁḍu cina Ahōbalēśvaradēva mahārājalagāru saṁbaṭūri pratināmamaina śrībhāṣyapuraṁ kēśava
perumāḷaku Anaṁtamulaina daṁḍamulu samarpiṁci pratisaṁvatsaramaṁdunu kēśavaperumāḷu Āśvija māsamaṁdu tirunāḷa mahātsavaṁ Avadhari
ṁce Aṁduku Iruvaireṁḍu varahāla kṣētramunu . caitramāsamaṁdu śrībhāṣyakālu tirunāḷa Avadhariṁce Aṁduku padivarahalakṣētramunu . kē
śavaperumāḷaku vaiśākhamāsamaṁdunnu tirunāḷa mahātsavaṁ Avadhariṁcce Aṁduku padi varahalakṣatramunu . parvalaṁdunu Utsavaṁ Aṁdu
ku maṁḍapaṁmīdanu tiruhāraṁ Āragiṁce Aṁduku mūḍuvarahalakṣētramunnurūḍhi yāṁbhaivarahalakṣētramunnu māku sadāśivadēvamahārāju
māku nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina Udayagiri cāvaḍiki cellēṭi ghaṁḍikōṭasīmaku celle mulikināṭi sīmalōnu caḍipirelagrāmamaṁdu komāḷlakālva
battulakālva cēni sdhalālu reṁḍunu kha 13Ó2 Akṣarālānu puṭṭi paḍu muttumunu kuṁcceḍunu reṁḍu muṁttalu cēnu trivāciṁkagānu sa
marpiṁstimi . yī mūḍu tirunāṁḷlalōnuṁnnu kēśavaperumāḷaku Ārugiṁcina prasādālalōnu mākuvaccinavi ddērva viḍukālu caturbhā
gaṁ bhōjanapalli kriṣṇamācāryulaku samarpiṁstimi . trivācikaṁgānu samarpiṁstimi . vāru viddērvaviḍukālu putrapautra pā
raṁ paryaṁgānu Ācaṁdārkkasdhāyigānu Anubhaviṁpagalavāru . veṁkaṭādri divōttuṁga śrībhāṣyanagariśriyā . sūtaṁraṁga
mānōyaṁ kēśavayāstu maṁgaḷaṁ . dānapālanayōrmadhvē dāvaccra yōnu pālanaṁ . dānatvarga
pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . śrīmaṁgaḷaṁ
Digital edition of SII 31.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
